scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run runtime:build
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build --workspace=apps/web && npm run build --workspace=apps/desktop && npm run dist --workspace=apps/desktop
scripts.app:dev: concurrently "npm run dev:runtime" "npm run dev:web" "npm run desktop:dev"
scripts.app:build: npm run build && npm run runtime:build && npm run desktop:build
